queries.query: GRANT CREATE EXTERNAL PROCEDURE ON openai_client TO dbc;
GRANT CREATE FUNCTION ON openai_client TO dbc;

REPLACE FUNCTION openai_client.CompleteChat()RETURNS TABLE VARYING USING FUNCTION OpenAIClientTO_contract LANGUAGE JAVA NO SQL PARAMETER STYLE SQLTable EXTERNAL NAME 'OPENAI_CLIENT:com.teradata.openai.client.ChatCompletionTO.execute()';

REPLACE FUNCTION openai_client.Embeddings()RETURNS TABLE VARYING USING FUNCTION EmbeddingsTO_contract LANGUAGE JAVA NO SQL PARAMETER STYLE SQLTable EXTERNAL NAME 'OPENAI_CLIENT:com.teradata.openai.client.EmbeddingsTO.execute()';
GRANT EXECUTE FUNCTION ON openai_client.CompleteChat TO demo_user;
GRANT EXECUTE FUNCTION ON openai_client.Embeddings TO demo_user;
